source_note: RCW 47.17.140 designates state route 90 (I-90) as the American Veterans Memorial Highway across Washington.
RCW 47.17.640 designates the SR 501 segment from the northerly junction of N.W. Lower River Road to the Ridgefield city limits as the Erwin O. Rieger Memorial Highway.

from_location: Junction with SR 5 north of Castle Rock
source_note: RCW 47.17.655 designates SR 504 as the Spirit Lake Memorial Highway (to the former Spirit Lake).
